products.name: Hydro Flask Standard Mouth 21 oz
products.tagline: A benchmark insulated bottle that's earned its reputation
products.what_it_is: A 21 oz double-wall vacuum-insulated stainless steel bottle with a leak-proof flex cap — cold 24h, hot 12h.
products.best_for: Everyday carry, hiking, commuting — anyone who wants cold water at 4pm that was filled at 8am.
products.stands_out: Powder-coat finish holds up to drops and daily use; wide variety of lid options and sizes.
products.before_you_buy: Pricier than alternatives with nearly identical insulation — you're partly paying for the brand.
products.skip_if: You want the same performance at a lower price or need a wide-mouth for ice cubes.

products.name: Simple Modern Summit Water Bottle 32 oz
products.tagline: Value alternative to Hydro Flask with equivalent insulation
products.what_it_is: A 32 oz vacuum-insulated stainless steel bottle with straw and chug lids included — wide mouth for ice.
products.best_for: Anyone who wants Hydro Flask-level insulation without the price premium; gym, office, or outdoors.
products.stands_out: Comes with multiple lid options; the wide mouth fits most ice cubes and is easy to clean.
products.before_you_buy: Some colorways fade more than others; stick to core colors for best durability.
products.skip_if: You specifically want the Hydro Flask brand ecosystem (lid compatibility, accessories).

products.name: Nalgene Wide Mouth 32 oz Tritan Bottle
products.tagline: The reliable plastic classic for sport and outdoor use
products.what_it_is: A BPA-free Tritan plastic 32 oz wide-mouth bottle with measurement markings — virtually indestructible.
products.best_for: Hiking, backpacking, outdoor activities where weight matters more than insulation.
products.stands_out: Lightweight at ~6 oz empty; extremely easy to clean; decades-proven durability.
products.before_you_buy: No insulation — your water will be ambient temperature within an hour outdoors.
products.skip_if: You need drinks to stay cold throughout the day or prefer stainless steel.
